mode_module.title: Cloudflare Release Mode
mode_module.purpose: Prepare Cloudflare changes for deployment with explicit validation, rollback and observability evidence.

required_evidence.evidence: Current and target Worker version or deployment reference where available.
Wrangler configuration diff and affected environments.
Compatibility date and compatibility flag changes.
Durable Object migration status, if applicable.
Local, preview and production validation boundaries.
Rollback, gradual deployment or version override plan where applicable.
Observability checks, including logs, exceptions, metrics or traces.
